summary: Universal Mobile Responsive UI Audit - All 15 test cases PASSED. Tested Landing, Dashboard, Story Video Studio, Billing, Profile, and Explore pages at 320px, 393px, 768px, and 1920px viewports. No horizontal scrollbars detected on any page at any viewport. Responsive CSS framework (20 modules) working correctly.

details: No horizontal scrollbar at any viewport
Hero section renders cleanly with fluid typography
Social proof counters display correctly at all widths
Review wall renders cleanly at 393px
Mobile menu opens/closes correctly at 320px
Footer displays correctly at all viewports
Desktop nav links visible at 1920px (not in mobile menu)
No horizontal scrollbar at any viewport
GlobalUserBar visible and compact at mobile widths
No header collision with GlobalUserBar
Cards and content render cleanly
No horizontal scrollbar at any viewport
Header title does not overflow
Support dock correctly hidden during /app/story-video-studio route
Form inputs and animation style cards display correctly
No horizontal scrollbar at any viewport
Pricing cards: 1 column at 393px (mobile)
Pricing cards: 2 columns at 768px (tablet)
Pricing cards: 4 columns at 1920px (desktop)
Compact header with vs-page-header class
No horizontal scrollbar at any viewport
Tabs scroll horizontally on mobile (scrollbar-hide class working)
Tabs fit without scroll on tablet and desktop
Compact header styling applied
No horizontal scrollbar at any viewport
Card grid: 2 columns at 393px (mobile)
Card grid: 3 columns at 768px (tablet)
Card grid: 4 columns at 1920px (desktop)
Landing page layout unchanged at 1920px
Dashboard layout unchanged at 1920px
Story Video Studio layout unchanged at 1920px
Billing page shows 4-column grid at 1920px

critical_code_review_comments: responsive.css implements 20 modules for universal mobile responsiveness
All pages use vs-page-header class for compact mobile headers
overflow-x: hidden applied to html/body prevents horizontal scroll
vs-card-grid and vs-pricing-grid use proper breakpoints (640px, 768px, 1024px, 1280px)
Profile tabs use scrollbar-hide class for clean horizontal scroll on mobile
Support dock correctly hidden on story-video-studio route via ResponsiveSupportWrapper
GlobalUserBar uses compact sizing (smaller padding/fonts) at mobile widths
context_for_next_testing_agent: Universal Mobile Responsive UI verified: All pages render cleanly at 320px, 393px, 768px, and 1920px. No horizontal scrollbars. Responsive CSS framework at /src/styles/responsive.css with 20 modules working correctly. Desktop layouts unchanged (frozen baseline). Key classes: vs-page-header, vs-card-grid, vs-pricing-grid, vs-tabs, scrollbar-hide.
